_about: Smoke-test cases for af-secondary-structure. Each case runs scripts/af_ss.py on a real AlphaFold model and checks the per-residue 8/3-state DSSP assignment, the pLDDT confidence bands (read from the B-factor column), the masked SS string, and the disordered-segment detection. Reference models: AF-P69905-F1 (HBA_HUMAN, well-folded all-alpha globin) and AF-P04637-F1 (P53_HUMAN, folded DNA-binding core flanked by disordered termini/linkers). Band fractions are cross-checked against the AlphaFold DB API's own fractionPlddt* values.
requires: mdtraj in a conda env (auto-discovered; conda install -c conda-forge mdtraj). AlphaFold models downloaded from the AlphaFold DB (see how_to_run). No other dependencies.

expect.note: Globin fold: mostly H with some G/I; only the N-terminal Met (pLDDT 65.4) is below 70, so exactly one length-1 disordered segment and one masked position.

expect.folded_core_retained: residues ~94-292 (the DNA-binding domain: beta-sandwich strands + helix) are mostly pLDDT>=70 and NOT masked
expect.note: Masking at cutoff 70 removes the N-terminal transactivation/proline-rich region, the post-DBD linker, and the C-terminal regulatory tail, while keeping the folded core.
mdtraj reads AlphaFold mmCIF directly; the two formats must yield identical SS and pLDDT.
--no-mask reports pLDDT + bands but never substitutes X; the masked string equals the raw string.

expect.mask_definition: count('X') in ss8_masked == number of residues with pLDDT < cutoff (when masking on)
expect.bands_match_AF_DB: summary.band_frac within ~0.02 of the AlphaFold DB API fractionPlddt{VeryLow,Low,Confident,VeryHigh}
expect.segments_below_cutoff: every residue inside a disordered_segment has pLDDT < cutoff

how_to_run: D=$(mktemp -d); for A in P69905 P04637; do U=$(curl -fsSL https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/api/prediction/$A | python3 -c 'import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin)[0]["pdbUrl"])'); curl -fsSL "$U" -o "$D/AF-$A-F1.pdb"; done; python scripts/af_ss.py "$D" --glob '*.pdb' -o "$D/out"; python3 -c "import json;d=json.load(open('$D/out/per_structure/AF-P69905-F1.json'));s=d['summary'];print('HBA %H',round(s['ss3_frac']['H']*100,1),'mean pLDDT',s['mean_plddt'],'segs',s['n_disordered_segments'])"
